paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 55 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 23 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 66 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 3 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522) — cleared all overdue.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** Down to 5 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 5 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **12 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 3. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.
**Ginger Brown:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

234 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **112 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 7 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 41 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is carrying 4 overdue, higher than their recent average. Time to clear the backlog.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue — oldest first. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — oldest first. 1 upcoming unassigned. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** Down to 5 overdue — good. Close them out today. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
